metadata.description: Token-cheap code intelligence for large codebases: serena (LSP navigation + symbol edits) + CBM (auto-sync knowledge graph + local semantic search) + ast-grep (structural search/rewrite).

plugins.name: code-intel
plugins.description: Graph-first code intelligence: serena & CBM MCP servers + ast-grep, with a graph-first workflow skill and indexing commands. Query the symbol graph before reading files to cut tokens on large repos.
